Copy.content: I grabbed my husband's phone to take a sunset photo.
A Venmo notification to a woman named Jade.$3,000.Tagged: "for the room."
Who was Jade? For the room?
I scrolled down with my stomach clenching, looking for context.
I checked my calendar. We'd spent that Saturday morning looking at paint samples for the bedroom.
He'd pecked me against the kitchen counter and said he couldn't wait to start our life together.
Then he'd bought four hundred dollars of lingerie that never showed up in my drawer.
My throat tightened. I kept scrolling.

hvpc.hook: A woman discovers suspicious Venmo transactions on her husband's phone.
hvpc.verify: Video presents husband's financial transactions implying infidelity.
hvpc.proof: On-screen text shows specific Venmo transactions for lingerie and flowers.
